text: The precise meaning of the word Chabul cannot be determined. Some have supposed a popular derivation which gave it the sense of ‘worthless’.

‘Kept the temple in repair’; literally, in the Latin, ‘finished it’. But it seems impossible to give any good reason why the finishing of the temple should be mentioned here as if it were a new event: and the verb used in the Hebrew text has the root sense of ‘making safe’.
